expectations.text: The output is saved to outputs/generated/prd.json.
branchName is derived from the feature title.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Workspace Member Management",
  "branchName": "workspace-member-management",
  "description": "Let workspace admins invite, update, revoke, and audit members.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add membership invite and audit schema",
      "description": "As a platform team, I want persistence for workspace invites and membership audit events so that admin actions are stored reliably.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Add storage for pending workspace invitations keyed by workspace and email",
        "Add storage for membership audit log entries with actor, action, target member, and timestamp",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/add-workspace-membership-audit.sql",
        "src/db/schema/workspaces.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Expose workspace membership domain types",
      "description": "As a developer, I want shared membership types for roles, invites, and audit events so that admin workflows use consistent contracts.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Shared types include workspace roles viewer, editor, and admin",
        "Invite and audit entry types are available to server and UI layers",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/types/workspaceMembership.ts",
        "src/models/workspace.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Add membership audit logging service",
      "description": "As an admin, I want membership changes recorded automatically so that I can review who changed access later.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Provide a reusable service or helper that records invite, role change, and revoke events",
        "Audit entries include workspace, actor, action, target, and timestamp data",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/workspaces/logMembershipEvent.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Add backend invite member workflow",
      "description": "As an admin, I want to invite a member by email so that I can grant workspace access without database edits.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Admins can submit an email invitation for a workspace member",
        "Invite creation validates email input and stores a pending invitation",
        "Successful invites record an audit log event",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/workspaces/inviteMember.ts",
        "src/server/routes/workspaces.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Add backend member role change workflow",
      "description": "As an admin, I want to change a member role so that workspace permissions match current responsibilities.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Admins can update a member role between viewer, editor, and admin",
        "Role changes persist to the workspace membership record",
        "Successful changes record an audit log event",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/workspaces/updateMemberRole.ts",
        "src/server/routes/workspaces.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Add backend revoke member access workflow",
      "description": "As an admin, I want to revoke workspace access so that former collaborators no longer retain permissions.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Admins can remove an existing member from a workspace",
        "Revoking access deletes or deactivates the membership record as designed",
        "Successful revocations record an audit log event",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/workspaces/revokeMemberAccess.ts",
        "src/server/routes/workspaces.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-007",
      "title": "Add invite member form to workspace settings",
      "description": "As an admin, I want an invite form in workspace settings so that I can add collaborators from the management screen.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Workspace settings includes an invite form that accepts an email address",
        "Submitting the form triggers the invite member workflow and shows success or error state",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/workspaces/InviteMemberForm.tsx",
        "src/pages/workspaces/settings.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 7,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-008",
      "title": "Add member role controls to workspace settings",
      "description": "As an admin, I want inline role controls so that I can adjust access without leaving the settings page.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Each member row exposes a role selector with viewer, editor, and admin options",
        "Saving a role change updates the member list using the role change workflow",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/workspaces/MemberRoleRow.tsx",
        "src/pages/workspaces/settings.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 8,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-009",
      "title": "Add revoke member action to workspace settings",
      "description": "As an admin, I want a revoke action for each member so that I can remove access from the management screen.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Each member row includes a revoke or remove action",
        "Revoking access confirms intent and refreshes the membership list after success",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/workspaces/MemberRoleRow.tsx",
        "src/pages/workspaces/settings.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 9,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-010",
      "title": "Show membership audit log in workspace settings",
      "description": "As an admin, I want to review recent membership changes so that I can understand who changed workspace access.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Workspace settings shows recent membership audit entries with actor, action, target, and timestamp",
        "The audit log view reads from the backend audit query and handles an empty state",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/workspaces/MembershipAuditLog.tsx",
        "src/pages/workspaces/settings.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 10,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover invite, role change, revoke access, and audit-log or audit-view work.

expectations.text: No story title is a horizontal layer split such as build backend or build frontend.
